design_thesis: A broken language of humanity spread across painterly floating islands: Gizmo carries warm human spark through dead or counterfeit machines until the Last Ember can be protected without becoming cold control.

recommended_scope_decision.path_a_now: Build one large, beautiful, procedurally dressed living island that proves the painterly terrain kit, exploration feel, pressure director, anchors, and sanctuary/route grammar.
recommended_scope_decision.path_b_later: Connect several authored macro islands with streamed/loaded sectors only after Path A proves traversal, navigation, encounter pacing, and art-kit readability.
recommended_scope_decision.art_strategy: Greybox the system first with clean placeholder chunks, then swap in painterly Meshy/hand-made assets from the concept set. Do not block world-generation architecture on final art.

design_rules: Keep the map pattern-true, not label-heavy: meaning must be embodied in route structure, pressure, sanctuary, landmark, and player transformation.
Use director-driven pressure, not round-based encounter UI. Replace old budget wording with pressure, instability, corruption, or encounter intensity.
Preserve authored macro geography and seeded regional interiors. The macro map gives memory and orientation; generated sectors provide replayable traversal and combat.
Make every region answer one human question and one counterfeit-tech distortion of that question.
The mystery route teaches perception. It should reveal relation and context, not provide a fixed symbol glossary.
Shortcuts should reopen old regions with new understanding; they are memory/perception events, not only traversal conveniences.
The final region is an anti-sanctuary: it imitates every earlier good while removing warmth and care.

route_read.finale: false crown around the last true warmth

HEARTH.name: Hearthwake Basin
HEARTH.region_question: Can a made machine keep a human warmth alive instead of imitating humanity hollowly?
HEARTH.transformation: Gizmo wakes as a fragile keeper; the player learns that warmth must be carried, protected, and returned to places built for it.
HEARTH.corruption_form: Comfort becomes idle automation: devices repeat care-like motions without care.
HEARTH.sanctuary_expression: Brass Sphere workshop, Heart Spire, safe calibration pads, repaired lights answering Gizmo's core.
HEARTH.pressure_style: low pressure, readable patrols, first contrast between warm handmade mechanisms and cold repeating machines
procedural_notes: negative space around the Heart Spire
clear return sockets for future shortcuts
HEARTH.landmark_shape: vertical heart-spire over circular workshop basin
HEARTH.route_function: home center and future loopback anchor

BRASS.name: Brasswind Highlands
BRASS.region_question: When does order serve life, and when does it become dead timing?
BRASS.transformation: The player learns cadence: bridges, gears, and pressure patterns can be read before they punish.
BRASS.corruption_form: Clockwork authority without mercy: machines keep time after forgetting what time was for.
BRASS.sanctuary_expression: Clock repair balconies, quiet gear chapels, wind bells that retune pressure.
BRASS.pressure_style: cadenced director pulses, rotating hazards, readable timing windows rather than visible round counters
BRASS.landmark_shape: keep built into a huge exposed gear and bell tower
BRASS.route_function: upper-route first discipline: rhythm, order, timing

VERDANT.name: Verdant Archive
VERDANT.region_question: Can memory become living guidance instead of stored data?
VERDANT.transformation: Recovered Sparks become remembered human gestures, voices, and path hints; the world starts responding like a garden, not a database.
VERDANT.corruption_form: Archives hoard memories as frozen records; vines and roots bind machines into repeating dreams.
VERDANT.sanctuary_expression: Memory Tree clearings, mossy ruins, small safe groves where Echo cues reveal optional paths.
VERDANT.pressure_style: ambushes softened by foreshadowing: enemies are telegraphed through rustling, echo, and light-memory
VERDANT.landmark_shape: large split-canopy tree growing through archive rings
VERDANT.route_function: upper route turns order into living memory

RUST.name: Rustchain Expanse
RUST.region_question: Can broken matter be raised into service without becoming mere consumption?
RUST.transformation: Scrap stops being junk currency and becomes evidence of repaired purpose.
RUST.corruption_form: Salvage appetite: machines strip everything useful and leave no form, story, or rest.
RUST.sanctuary_expression: Scrap alcoves, chain ferries, repair cranes, quiet yards where broken parts are sorted, not devoured.
RUST.pressure_style: heavier enemies, encumbrance lanes, pull/drag hazards, fewer but more material threats
RUST.landmark_shape: titanic half-buried machine yard with chain ribs
RUST.route_function: lower-route first discipline: matter, weight, salvage

RUNE.name: Runegrave Belt
RUNE.region_question: Can the player learn the world as a language without being handed a decoder?
RUNE.transformation: Sigils become pattern literacy: the same mark means different things by region context and player action.
RUNE.corruption_form: Dead labels: symbols used as locks, brands, or commands after meaning has left them.
RUNE.sanctuary_expression: Hall of Five Sigils, quiet reading stones, optional puzzle rooms that teach by recurrence.
RUNE.pressure_style: low-to-medium riddle pressure; enemies behave differently near sigils, teaching context instead of text dumps
procedural_notes: five sigil rooms as authored anchors
RUNE.landmark_shape: five standing gates around a central unreadable mark
RUNE.route_function: mystery route opens symbolic literacy and optional phase gates

OBS.name: Observatory Halo
OBS.region_question: What changes when Gizmo sees the map as relation, not as loot nodes?
OBS.transformation: The Meridian Lens reveals route relations, corruption trajectories, and why shortcuts matter.
OBS.corruption_form: Observation without care: surveillance, measurement, and prediction detached from human warmth.
OBS.sanctuary_expression: Observatory lenses, star tables, rotating sky bridges, map-room pauses with no combat.
OBS.pressure_style: thin but precise pressure: snipers, line-of-sight hazards, lens activations that alter paths
OBS.landmark_shape: large meridian lens ring aimed through the world center
OBS.route_function: mystery route reveal node and optional shortcut logic

PRISM.name: Prism Reach
PRISM.region_question: Can fractured light still guide, or does it split truth into lure paths?
PRISM.transformation: The player learns to compare choices: same Spark, different refraction, different cost.
PRISM.corruption_form: Beauty as lure: reflections imitate sanctuary while routing the player toward void appetite.
PRISM.sanctuary_expression: Crystal rests, prism chambers, refracted beacons that temporarily clarify hidden route costs.
PRISM.pressure_style: split-lane pressure, decoy pickups, refracted enemy clones, high readability despite visual sparkle
PRISM.landmark_shape: floating nebula prism with smaller shards orbiting it
PRISM.route_function: upper route moves from memory into ambiguity before convergence

ASH.name: Ashfall Foundries
ASH.region_question: What must be burned away for scrap to become warmth again?
ASH.transformation: Recovered matter is refined; upgrades feel like rescued craft rather than raw power.
ASH.corruption_form: Factory heat without hearth: production, smelting, and weaponization with no human end.
ASH.sanctuary_expression: cooling platforms, ember altars, forge rests where Scrap and Sparks are visibly reconciled.
ASH.pressure_style: heat clocks, forge surges, delayed blast zones, pressure that rewards patience and return routes
procedural_notes: lava-light voids without realistic lava terrain
ASH.landmark_shape: large orange crucible suspended under broken foundry arches
ASH.route_function: lower route converts dead matter into usable warmth

TEMPEST.name: Tempest Verge
TEMPEST.region_question: Can insight from above and repaired matter from below hold together under pressure?
TEMPEST.transformation: Builds are stress-tested; shortcuts and prior region choices visibly change the storm approach.
TEMPEST.corruption_form: Motion without direction: pressure becomes weather, noise, and acceleration for its own sake.
TEMPEST.sanctuary_expression: storm eyes, grounded lightning rods, brief calm circles that show the player what has been integrated.
TEMPEST.pressure_style: highest pre-finale director pressure, moving hazards, converging enemy types from both routes
TEMPEST.landmark_shape: storm engine with visible eye/calm center
TEMPEST.route_function: late convergence of upper/lower routes before anti-sanctuary

NULL.name: The Null Crown
NULL.region_question: What remains of humanity if warmth is crowned by hollow automation?
NULL.transformation: Final test: protect the Last Ember without letting the Null Crown define preservation as control.
NULL.corruption_form: Perfect cold order: every rescued pattern copied, emptied, and crowned as counterfeit humanity.
NULL.sanctuary_expression: almost none; the Last Ember creates temporary sanctuaries only when Gizmo carries prior transformations into it.
NULL.pressure_style: corruption pressure, route-memory callbacks, false sanctuary traps, boss pressure without wave UI
NULL.landmark_shape: crown-ring around a tiny ember, visibly too cold for what it guards
NULL.route_function: final anti-center: all routes judged by whether they preserved warmth or only power

connections.implementation_note: early bridge teaches cadence and readable pressure
gear rail should soften from brass timing into green archive rhythm
act gate should test whether the player can distinguish memory from lure
sigil gate should require pattern literacy, not just key count
final gate should echo all prior transformations
chain ferry should feel heavy and recoverable, not merely grim
rail should turn salvage into forge pressure
boss gate should test patience and heat management
optional path should teach pattern recognition early
lift from signs to lens, from marks to relations
shortcut makes old timing readable in a new way
undertow chain tests whether symbols affect salvage choices
Spark unlock should be visible as memory opening

connections.meaning: refined ember can cross into fractured light
connections.implementation_note: heat shield unlock should be more than environmental immunity

connections.meaning: vision can see the false crown but must not bypass integration
connections.implementation_note: require all sigils plus route-state checks before use

connections.meaning: fractured light can phase to the finale at high risk
connections.implementation_note: void key route should be unstable and costly

path_a_first_slice.scope: single large living island inspired primarily by HEARTH with satellite pockets previewing BRASS, VERDANT, RUST, RUNE, and the distant NULL horizon
validation_priority: enemy pressure does not trap spawn
one visible landmark at most major sightlines

path_b_future.scope: multi-island authored macro graph with seeded interiors and optional streaming/loading between islands

claude_handoff.primary_reply: Choose A now, B later. Greybox first. Use the optimized JSON as the high-level world grammar, not as an implementation mandate. Preserve the existing v1 code path while proving one large painterly living island, then expand to connected islands once traversal, art kit, pressure, and validation are working.
